scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,storefront,cms -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w storefront" "npm run dev -w cms"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w storefront && npm run build -w cms
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,storefront,cms -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w storefront" "npm run start -w cms"
